Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. Good cause shown and no opposition. Per CCP 877 and 877.6, the settlement between the City and plaintiff Jesus Rojas is in good faith and all claims for equitable indemnity and equitable contribution against the City are barred. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
